## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented change.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --features gui -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets --features gui`
- [ ] Tested relevant GUI behavior

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, real conversations, databases, or private paths are included
- [ ] Rollback and failure behavior were considered
- [ ] Documentation was updated if user-visible behavior changed
